meaning: n.山凹,小湾,<美>小峡谷,(延至树林的)狭长开阔地,[建]穹窿,拱v.(使)内凹,(使)成拱形
examples: The fossils at Dinosaur Cove are embedded in hard sandstone.
The house is situated on a hillside overlooking Fairview Cove.
The old cove must be a Jew.
Approached along a pitted dirt track, the rocky cove curves like a horseshoe around the lucent blue waters.
The most dramatic is Stiniva a pebble cove with a narrow entrance flanked by high rocks.
